params.name: Mysterious Thief's Letter
params.description: The exclusive preview letter of the legendary phantom thief, Arsène Lupin. The exquisite letter and its elaborate words not only reveal the identity and taste of its creator but also the included Arsène Lupin-style mask enhances its value as a collectible.
